title: Bump ComfyUI v0.27.0 -> v0.28.0 (node_lock + Pod image + Builder parity)
description: Bump ComfyUI v0.27.0 -> v0.28.0 across node_lock.json (core tag+commit, frontend/template pins), system_dependencies.json (LOCAL engine), the mpi-ci build-context lock copy, and the Builder COMFYUI_REF (that half is MPI-183, retarget 0.27.0 -> 0.28.0). Drivers: a node gated at 0.28 that the Krea2 edit/inpaint work needs (it runs on the Krea2 1.2 identity-edit LoRA we already ship - no new weight; user has a video with the details), plus 0.28's more optimized int8/int4 paths and the Turing black-image fix on quantized models. Apply the pin rule first (memory project_comfyui_bump_cadence): research the exact minor every near-term node needs and pin to the HIGHEST floor - one bump per wave. Ships as ONE dev image bundled with MPI-341 (single CI dispatch at 0.17.0-dev, BOTH legs), which also gives MPI-340's dev IMAGE tag path its first real proof. Feature wiring is NOT in this card. Full detail in brief.md.
